summary: Conservative autonomous inventory result for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations, merge, close, or fix PR actions are planned because this job disables merge/fix/raise_pr, disables instant close, and several PRs have maintainer-review, proof, draft, assignment, or review-bot blockers. One linked security-sensitive ref is quarantined separately.

actions.reason: Dependency upgrade is technically green but requires maintainer review; no merge action is allowed in this job.
Focused assigned bug-fix PR needs maintainer/technical judgment and proof resolution before any merge path.
Keep open as related work; draft/proof/dirty state blocks merge but does not justify closure.
Keep open as related feature work; actionable review findings and proof failure block merge, while instant close and fix PRs are disabled.
Focused bug-fix PR with disputed/resolved-looking bot comments and waiting-author status needs maintainer technical judgment; merge is blocked by job policy.
Exact linked ref is security-sensitive and must route to central OpenClaw security handling only.

needs_human: #92125 requires maintainer review for a green dependency bump; merge is blocked by job policy.
#93561 requires maintainer/technical judgment for a focused assigned cron watchdog fix with failing proof and unstable/failing checks.
#48942 requires maintainer judgment on focused gateway session-title changes, waiting-author status, and review-bot resolution.
